Name: American Indian Barbie Doll #2
Description: Join American Indian Barbie® doll and her baby sister as they bring history to life! Barbie® looks beautiful in her turquoise-colored dress with matching moccasins. Her baby sister comes with her own carrier so Barbie® can take her on a picnic. The accompanying storybook tells a tale of the gifts that animals have given their tribe, helping them to better live in their environment.

Name: Hot Skatin' Barbie Doll
Description: 2 ways to skate: In-line skating and ice skating!

Name: Pioneer Shopkeeper Barbie Doll
Description: Second in the American Stories Series™, Pioneer Shopkeeper Barbie® doll follows her dreams as a young shopkeeper selling wares from her general store. She's dressed in a full-length calico dress with an ivory apron and a matching bonnet. She even comes with an adorable milk pail from the store. A Collector Edition doll, girls will adore both this doll and the very special storybook that brings pioneer history to life.

Name: Civil War Nurse Barbie Doll
Description: Travel to the battle at Gettysburg as Barbie® tends the wounded in her nurse's uniform. She's pure inspiration in her blue and white striped dress, crisp white apron and cape coat draped across her shoulders. She even comes ready for action with her own medical bag. Girls are sure to love this ministering angel. From the American Stories Series™, this beautiful Barbie® doll even comes with her own storybook that teaches kids about life during Civil War times.

Name: Patriot Barbie Doll
Description: Lovely Patriot Barbie® doll brings us back to revolutionary times in her elegant gown and navy military jacket. She wears a navy tricorner hat with a feather and carries a golden liberty bell. Discover her story and why she carries the bell in the accompanying storybook "Liberty Dream" that tells a tale of Patriot Barbie® and how she made a difference in Philadelphia, 1776!

Name: Gymnast Barbie
Description: Barbie is so flexible, you can bend and move her just like a real gymnast! When she's ready to perform - look out! Barbie is a perfect 10!

Name: Polynesian Barbie Doll
Description: Polynesian Barbie doll is dressed for a traditional celebration called the luau which is known for its great feasts and dancing. Barbie wears a red and white bikini top and traditional "grass" skirt. Also traditional in Polynesian culture are the flowers around her neck, called a lei, as well as the floral garland crowning her long dark hair. And in keeping with Polynesian dancing tradition, Barbie is bare foot.

Name: Polish Barbie Doll
Description: From a beautiful land of many forests and rivers comes Barbie Doll Barbie doll. She's ready to dance a polka in her traditional folk costume. Although each region of the country has its own style, almost all feature a decorated vest like this one, with a striped skirt and lacy apron. Barbie doll's blonde hair is worn in two thick braids and is adorned with a crown of flowers and colorful ribbon.

Name: French Barbie Doll
Description: Bonjour! French Barbie doll is ready to kick up her heels wearing an authentic replica of a French cancan costume. This is the famous French dance known for its high leg kicks that has helped make Paris famous. Her fitted, black- and white-striped bodice is decorated with a white lace ruffle on the neckline and sleeves. Fuchsia and yellow flowers are nestled amongst the lace on the neckline. She has a fuchsia satin skirt trimmed with two layers of white lace. Her high-brimmed black hat is adorned with flowers and long feather wisps. To complete the look, her accessories include black opaque tights, black boots and a black ribbon choker.

Name: Norwegian Barbie Doll (purple dress)
Description: From the land of the midnight sun comes a doll that can light up the night: meet Norwegian Barbie doll. This Collector Edition doll wears a traditional, lace trimmed, blue jumper dress called a "bunad. " Her crisp, white blouse, trimmed in blue around the collar, features beautiful pouffed sleeves. She has a matching square cap and an adorable printed purse with a silvery top and cord. She even wears a traditional Norwegian silvery coin necklace. Of course this international beauty sports long, beautiful blonde Norwegian braids.

Name: Japanese Barbie Doll 2nd Edition
Description: Welcome this elegant beauty in her authentic native costume. Barbie doll is dressed in a traditional floral print kimono with its obi (wide belt) tied with a bow in the back. She's wearing traditional zori slippers with tabi (short white socks) and her shiny black hair is tied back with a simple pink bow. Join her for a formal tea ceremony, or other special occasion.

Name: Arctic Barbie Doll
Description: From one of the coldest regions on earth comes a doll to warm your heart. Arctic Barbie doll, from the Dolls of the World Collection, is dressed in an outfit styled after that worn by natives of the northern latitudes. Her fleecy parka has white faux fur trim on the hood, sleeves and hem. The latter two items are accented with a wide gold, red and green braid. Two golden cords tie at the neck to keep out the Arctic winds. The matching fleecy pants are tucked into her mukluks and are embellished with white "fur" and red stitching. Her face is framed by the white "fur" that adorns her hood.

Name: Thai Barbie Doll
Description: As beautiful and exotic as the land she represents, Thai Barbie doll is ready to perform a traditional dance, called the Lacon, in her ceremonial costume. Her headdress resembles a golden Wat (temple). Her shiny green cape has golden and red highlights and her multicolored skirt has a golden belt and sash. She has golden bracelets on each arm and her feet are bare, just like a Thai dancer!

Name: Ghanaian BarbieDoll
Description: Tour the wilds of Africa with this Collector Edition Barbie doll in a traditional costume from the West African country of Ghana. She wears an authentically styled Kente cloth tunic dress that ties into a bow below her knees. A brightly colored turban ties around her head and she wears flat golden sandals for walking through the lush forests. Her beautiful jewelry, including golden hoop earrings, a bangle bracelet and a seashell necklace, all add to the captivating charm of this African beauty.

Name: Irish Barbie Doll 2nd Edition
Description: Irish Barbie doll is from the beautiful land of luck, lakes, and blarney! Her beautiful green dress is accented with patches of white lace on her sleeves, skirt, and collar. A lacy white cap crowns her mane of flowing red hair. Her shoes, the color of shamrocks, complete this adorable ensemble.

Name: Australian BarbieDoll
Description: G'day (hello) from Australia, the land "down under"! Australian Barbie sports an outfit typical of a jillaroo (female rancher) in the outback. Her brown, wide-brimmed hat protects her face from the hot sun while her tan skirt and vest match much of the dusty terrain found in the outback. Underneath her vest, Barbie wears a red and white short-sleeved blouse, with a knotted red scarf tied around her neck. And finally, her boots make for easy walking through the brush as she moves from one adventure to the next!

Name: Russian Barbie Doll 2nd Edition
Description: Welcome Russian Barbie doll, in her authentic costume that could be worn during a traditional festival or wedding. She has a red tunic trimmed with golden braid and worn over a white blouse. Her skirt is also trimmed with a multicolored braid down the center and a golden braid around the hem. Her red and golden hairpiece crowns her blonde hair, which is worn in a long, thick braid. To fully authenticate the look, she wears red boots and golden earrings.

Name: Italian Barbie Doll 2nd Edition
Description: Ciao (hello) from Italy, the boot-shaped European country known for food, fashion, and fun! Barbie doll wears a colorful costume traditionally worn by Neopolitan dancers in the city of Naples. Her white peasant blouse is topped by a colorful jacket, skirt, and apron. A single flower, tied with ribbon, adorns Barbie doll's long brown hair. Her festive costume reflects the mood of this fun-loving country. Arrivederci (good-bye)!

Name: Native American Barbie Doll 2nd Edition
Description: Native American Barbie doll prepares for a traditional powwow ceremony. Her long dress, inspired by the original Native American buckskin dresses, is accented with a silvery-colored belt, long, colorful fringe, and a gorgeous multi-colored bodice. Feathers complement this beautiful ensemble, both on her dress, and intertwined in her dark braided hair.

Name: French Barbie Doll
Description: Bonjour! French Barbie doll is ready to kick up her heels wearing an authentic replica of a French cancan costume. This is the famous French dance known for its high leg kicks that has helped make Paris famous. Her fitted, black- and white-striped bodice is decorated with a white lace ruffle on the neckline and sleeves. Fuchsia and yellow flowers are nestled amongst the lace on the neckline. She has a fuchsia satin skirt trimmed with two layers of white lace. Her high-brimmed black hat is adorned with flowers and long feather wisps. To complete the look, her accessories include black opaque tights, black boots and a black ribbon choker.

Name: Chinese Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie doll is a living muse of Chinese beauty and cultural tradition. Dressed in a rich pink chrysanthemum print guazi (robe) over a slim skirt of the same design, Chinese Barbie Doll exudes the simplistic grace of the Chinese culture. Her gorgeous costume is accented by intricate black and golden bordering, with black slippers covering her feet.

Name: Puerto Rican Barbie Doll
Description: Say hola, or hello, to beautiful Puerto Rican Barbie doll from the Dolls of the World Collection. She wears a long white cotton dress trimmed with lace, pink ribbon and floral adornments. Her skirt has lace ruffles trimmed with a pink border. She also wears a wide pink ribbon around her waist that is accented with a flower. Her long, wavy brown hair is adorned with a pink flower. Her accessories include earrings, a ring and shoes.

Name: Native American Barbie Doll 3rd Edition
Description: This Native American doll, from the Southern Plains, is dressed in an updated version of a tribal princess costume. Pretty in a pink tunic and skirt with geometric patterns, her costume is trimmed in white fringe and ribbon. Her moccasins, beaded necklace, "turquoise" earrings and ring complete this modern powwow look.

Name: American Indian Barbie Doll
Description: It's Barbie® as an American Indian caring for her cousin, Baby Blue Feather™. This Collector Edition Barbie® doll wears a tan buckskin-like dress with matching boots. The tiny papoose she carries has a "buckskin" headband and diaper and comes with a matching backpack. Children will love the magical story Barbie® tells. From the American Stories Series™, this very special Barbie® doll comes with her own historical storybook, so she's educational as well as fun.

Name: Arctic Barbie Doll
Description: From one of the coldest regions on earth comes a doll to warm your heart. Arctic Barbie doll, from the Dolls of the World Collection, is dressed in an outfit styled after that worn by natives of the northern latitudes. Her fleecy parka has white faux fur trim on the hood, sleeves and hem. The latter two items are accented with a wide gold, red and green braid. Two golden cords tie at the neck to keep out the Arctic winds. The matching fleecy pants are tucked into her mukluks and are embellished with white "fur" and red stitching. Her face is framed by the white "fur" that adorns her hood.

Name: Mexican Barbie Doll 2nd Edition
Description: Bienvenidos! Or welcome to Mexico with this colorful beauty from the Dolls of the World Collection. Barbie Doll wears a fiesta costume in red, white and green to celebrate the colors of the Mexican flag. Her white peasant blouse is trimmed with ruffled lace and ribbon, while her three-tiered skirt is accented with rick-rack and trimmed with matching lace. From her ribbon cinched waist to the big red rose in her long, jet black hair, Mexican Barbie doll is muy bonita (very beautiful)!

Name: Dutch Barbie Doll
Description: Dutch Barbie doll wears a costume native to the fishing village of Volendam. Her dress includes a blue bodice and striped skirt accented with an embroidered collar and apron. Her hulletje, a traditional white bonnet, rests atop her blond braided hair, and flairs out to the sides. Her delicate feet are encased in white "wooden" shoes, called klompen, that are perfect for life in the Netherlands because they keep the feet dry, regardless of the weather.

Name: Native American Barbie Doll 1st Edition
Description: Native American Barbie doll is part of a proud Indian heritage, rich in culture and tradition. Her tribe-inspired costume is a white dress decorated with Indian artwork, fringe, and complemented by the soft faux leather moccasins on her feet. Her purse is also decorated with fringe. Indian women often wear their hair in braids, like this doll, tied at each end with blue bands.

Name: Native American Barbie Doll 4th Edition
Description: Dressed in a festive outfit for ceremonial events, Native American Barbie doll looks authentic from head to toe. She's wearing a "buckskin" fringed top with a matching skirt. Silvery braided trim highlights her outfit. Her long black hair is adorned with a headband and turquoise-colored feather. In keeping with Native American traditions, she has soft "buckskin" moccasins on her feet.

Name: German Barbie Doll 2nd Edition
Description: German Barbie doll is ready for Octoberfest, a traditional German festival of dancing, food, and fun. She wears a dress with a full red skirt trimmed in black, a blouse with golden trim, ruffled white cuffs, and golden trim, and a crisp white apron and shawl. Her blond braids are wrapped in circles, very traditional in Germany, and tied with blue ribbon.

Name: POG Fun Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie wears POG accessories.

Name: Cool Shoppin' Barbie
Description: Shopping fun dot Barbie and you... and a working cash register too!

Name: Bicyclin' Barbie
Description: Bicyclin' Barbie is ready to ride with real action poses. Make Barbie ride, she pedals on her own. Her bike has shiny rims. She fits perfectly to the bicycle seat. Set comes with helmet, bike shoes, flag and water bottle. Sunglasses

Name: Chilean Barbie Doll
Description: This South American beauty sends a hearty greeting to Barbie doll collectors everywhere! Chilean Barbie doll wears a charming costume based on the clothing of the huaso, or Chilean cowboy, which is worn for roundups and rodeos. Her bolero jacket is worn over a traditional dress with ruffles on the top and a black skirt on the bottom. Her costume sports a hat and sash banded in red, blue and white, the colors on the Chilean flag. Adios!

Name: Winter Holiday Barbie and Sisters Gift Set
Description: Includes 4 dolls, Barbie and her 3 little sisters.

Name: Hula Hair Barbie Doll
Description: Hula Hair Barbie doll

Name: Jewel Hair Mermaid Midge Doll
Description: The longest hair ever!

Name: Disney's 101 Dalmatians Barbie Doll
Description: Special Edition

Name: Winter Sports Barbie Doll
Description: Contains accessories to practice 3 winter sports.

Name: Olympic Gymnast Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie is off to the Olympics. She wears a red, white, and blue gymnastics suit and has a medal around her neck. Barbie also includes a gym bag and a "magic tumbling ring for somersaults, cartwheels and more!"

Name: Olympic Gymnast Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie is off to the Olympics. She wears a red, white, and blue gymnastics suit and has a medal around her neck. Barbie also includes a gym bag and a "magic tumbling ring for somersaults, cartwheels and more!"

Name: Bubbling Mermaid Barbie Doll
Description: Make bubbles flow from her magical crown!

Name: Skating Star Barbie Doll (hispanic)
Description: Special Edition

Name: Flying Hero Barbie Doll
Description: One day Barbie discovered she had magical powers To Fly and super human strength to protect and defend the world from harm. Together with her heroic friends and Flying Hero horse, this team is ready for action!

Name: Skating Star Barbie Doll (Blonde)
Description: Special Edition

Name: Walt Disney World Barbie Doll
Description: Walt Disney World Barbie

Name: Stacie Cute N Cool Fashion Doll Outfit
Description: Plaid Dress, White Denim Jacket, Matching Purse & Shoes.

Name: 1998 Happy Holidays Barbie Doll
Description: 1998 Happy Holidays® Barbie® doll presents her sophistication and elegance dressed in a holiday theme gown in rich black velvety fabric with exquisite silver glitter accents — she is truly something special as the only doll in the series to wear black. A pink cape and jeweled tiara accent this stunning ensemble. As a bonus, this doll carries the distinction of the being the first in the Happy Holidays series to wear her hair styled in an elegant upsweep.

Name: 1996 Happy Holidays Barbie Doll
Description: In a charming burgundy velvet coat trimmed in luxurious white faux fur, Barbie® doll welcomes the holiday season. Underneath her lovely velvet coat is a golden-tiered skirt. A gorgeous white faux fur muff and hat match the fur accents at her collar and sleeves.

Name: Victorian Elegance Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie® doll is an elegant beauty in this lavish maroon and brown faux fur skating costume. Her long skirt and matching bonnet create a warm vision for cold winter days. Victorian Elegance® Barbie® was originally inspired by an antique greeting card, and comes with two miniature greeting cards of her own.

Name: Barbie Doll as Little Bo Peep
Description: The children's nursery rhyme becomes even more charming with this wonderful introduction from the Children's Collector Series. It's Barbie® doll as Little Bo Peep in a sweet pink gown with a glittery skirt of rosebuds and vines. Pink pantaloons trimmed with lace peek from beneath her skirt, while a giant pink bonnet, also trimmed in lace, holds her long, lovely ringlets in place. This Collector Edition doll even carries a white shepherd's staff to keep track of her little lost sheep.

Name: Radiant In Red Barbie Doll
Description: Special Edition.

Name: Pinstripe Power Giftset
Description: Barbie® doll carries off suit strategy with style! Sipping her cafe latte, she dashes into her office wearing a navy pinstripe trouser suit with a fitted jacket. Barbie® is well-suited for success with her signature scarf bearing the BMR™ logo, black loafer pumps and a bold white fedora. Her roomy black "vinyl" shoulder strap tote with golden accents holds her keys, black glasses and newspaper. For the evening, Barbie® changes into a matching skirt, white silky halter-vest and faux pearl jewelry. Black pumps, coordinating stockings and a small white evening bag turn the workday world into a starry night.

Name: Sentimental Valentine Barbie Doll
Description: Sentimental Valentine™ Barbie® doll wears a crimson, velvety-rich gown, trimmed with delicate lace. She's a vision of love with her sweet face and beautiful hair, accented so exquisitely by a drop-"pearl" headpiece. Created to celebrate the centuries-old tradition of exchanging valentines on February 14th, the Be My Valentine Collector Series™ dolls wear gowns modeled after the fashions of the 1830s, which reflect the motif of the elaborate, lace-embellished greetings of this time.

Name: Little Debbie Barbie Doll Series II
Shopping Spree (F.A.O. Schwarz) Barbie Doll
Description: Includes shopping bag.

Name: Country Bride Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie doll with a wedding dress.

Name: Barbie Doll as Maria in The Sound of Music
Description: Capture the Sound of Music as Barbie® doll portrays the wonderful heroine from one of the most beloved movies of all time. It's an authentic reproduction taken right from the film. Barbie® doll is dressed in a demure jumper with a floral printed brocade skirt, complete with "alpine glitter. " Just like Maria in the movie, Barbie® wears short, cropped hair. She has a simple straw hat atop her head and even carries a miniature guitar. From her big blue eyes to beautiful smile, Barbie® as Maria is utterly charming.

Name: Barbie Doll as Maria in The Sound of Music
Description: Capture the Sound of Music as Barbie® doll portrays the wonderful heroine from one of the most beloved movies of all time. It's an authentic reproduction taken right from the film. Barbie® doll is dressed in a demure jumper with a floral printed brocade skirt, complete with "alpine glitter. " Just like Maria in the movie, Barbie® wears short, cropped hair. She has a simple straw hat atop her head and even carries a miniature guitar. From her big blue eyes to beautiful smile, Barbie® as Maria is utterly charming.

Name: Winter's Eve Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie wears a beautiful winter dress.

Name: University Barbie - Tennessee Barbie Doll
Description: Gimme a B

Name: University Barbie - Tennessee Barbie Doll
Description: Gimme a B

Name: Barbie Doll as the Swan Queen in Swan Lake
Description: From an unforgettable ballet comes an unforgettable doll. Barbie® as the Swan Queen in Swan Lake is a perfect addition to the Classic Ballet Series™. She appears so delicate in a sparkling ballerina costume. Her bodice is decorated with fanciful trim and frilly "feathers" at the neckline. Her pleated skirt almost appears to be swan feathers with its layers of fabric. Her shimmering tights and ballet slippers authenticate her outfit which is wonderfully accented by a silvery tiara. She's truly ready for the footlights.

Name: Silver Sweetheart Barbie Doll
Description: Exclusive at SEARS

Name: Wedding Barbie Doll (Redhead)
Description: A truly lovely vinyl reproduction of a nostalgic Barbie® doll wearing the Wedding Day® fashion from the 1960's. Barbie® doll's gown is exquisitely created with white flocked tulle and a sprinkling of glitter over a satin lining. The bodice has a sweetheart neckline with white netting, the skirt is full. Her accessories include "something old" — her mother's "pearl" necklace, "something new" — white heels, "something borrowed" — white gloves and "something blue" — her garter. Her bouquet is delicately fashioned of fabric flowers.

Name: Barbie Rose Bride Doll
Description: At last that special day is here when wedding bells ring loud and clear. Barbie is the blushing bride with handsome Ken standing by her side! Alas it's just a dream for two but someday, Barbie, it will come true!

Name: Barbie Doll as the Sugar Plum Fairy
Description: A truly lovely doll begins the Classic Ballet Series™, featuring dolls dressed in costumes from the world's most beloved ballets. From Tchaikovsky's Nutcracker comes Barbie® doll as the Sugar Plum Fairy, whose costume is a delicate work of art with its skirt in several shimmering layers of light pink tulle. An ivory bodice is trimmed in golden ribbons and bows. She wears sheer ivory tights and pink ballet slippers with lace-up ribbons.

Name: Barbie Doll as Rapunzel
Description: It's a fairytale come true as Barbie® portrays Rapunzel, the lovely maiden with her long, beautiful hair. It's a story every little girl loves, and Barbie® doll plays the part perfectly in an enchanting turquoise and lavender gown dusted with glitter. From her metallic bodice to her sparkling skirt and golden cap adorned with glittering streamers, this Collector Edition doll is the ultimate fairytale princess. And true to the tale, her braided hair reaches all the way to the floor to let her handsome prince climb up to her tower. It's no wonder she was a 1995 Doll Reader "Dolls of the Year" nominee.

Name: Poodle Parade Barbie Doll
Description: Everyone loves a parade, and Barbie® doll could lead one in this reproduction of a 1965 Barbie® doll and vintage fashion. Her facepaint, sculpting and hairstyle are pure nostalgia, while her fitted olive green jumper and checkered knit coat make you yearn for the fashion sense of yesterday. Her accessories include a pink scarf, tote bag, sunglasses, trophy and first prize certificate.

Name: Barbie Doll as Cinderella
Description: From the classic children's fairy tale, comes Barbie® doll as Cinderella. She's the third doll in the Children's Collector Series. Her beautiful gown captures the magic of Cinderella at the ball wearing a starlight blue gown with shimmering golden bodice. Barbie® truly is a beautiful and delicate fairy tale princess. The gown's skirt is two layers, with blue satin underneath and a white tulle overskirt with golden highlights. Barbie® has extra-long golden hair adorned with a lovely crown. Her accessories also include a choker, earrings, golden ring and of course, "glass" slippers.

Name: Teacher Barbie Doll (Blonde)
Description: Teacher Barbie Doll

Name: Teacher Barbie Doll (Blonde)
Description: Teacher Barbie Doll

Name: 1997 Happy Holidays Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie® doll is a true image of royal splendor in holiday red, snowy white and glittering gold with a golden tiara adorned with six ruby-colored gemstones. Festive accents include a jeweled choker and earrings.

Name: Barbie Doll as Maria in The Sound of Music
Description: Capture the Sound of Music as Barbie® doll portrays the wonderful heroine from one of the most beloved movies of all time. It's an authentic reproduction taken right from the film. Barbie® doll is dressed in a demure jumper with a floral printed brocade skirt, complete with "alpine glitter. " Just like Maria in the movie, Barbie® wears short, cropped hair. She has a simple straw hat atop her head and even carries a miniature guitar. From her big blue eyes to beautiful smile, Barbie® as Maria is utterly charming.

Name: Victorian Lady Barbie Doll
Description: It was a time when dainty ladies wore velvet and lace, and never had a hair out of place. Meet Victorian Lady Barbie® doll from The Great Eras® Collection. She's dressed in an authentic velvety Victorian gown, with loads of ivory lace and an elegant bustle. Lovely mauve rosettes accent each side of her rich burgundy dress. Her long, dark hair is braided in the back and styled into a demure Victorian up-do. From her long, rooted eyelashes to her marabou headpiece this Collector Edition doll is a picture of Victorian propriety.

Name: Grecian Goddess Barbie Doll
Description: Protector of Ancient Athens. Goddess of wisdom. Beautiful beyond words. Meet Grecian Goddess Barbie® doll from The Great Eras® Collection. This Collector Edition doll, fashioned after the goddess Athena, wears a white pleated tunic, decorated with golden laurel leaves, and cinched at the waist. A royal purple cloak adds contrast and color to this ravishing beauty. Her hair is charmingly styled in clusters of blonde ringlets around her face and gathered into one curled ponytail. From her iridescent sandals to her elaborate headdress and long rooted eyelashes, she's definitely the high priestess of fashion.

Name: Elizabethan Queen Barbie Doll
Description: From The Great Eras® Collection Barbie® doll achieves true royal stature in a stunning quilted dress reminiscent of the 16th century. Representing Queen Elizabeth, Barbie® doll's luxuriant red, white, and golden gown has a full skirt, fitted top with long sleeves, and lacy collar. Her dramatic hairstyle, regal hat with golden trim, and golden cross necklace add elegant touches to this already incredible costume.

Name: Egyptian Queen Barbie Doll
Description: From The Great Eras® Collection, Barbie® doll is an Egyptian queen in this royal costume capturing the essence of Egypt's Golden Age. She wears a dress including a white pleated skirt with golden trim, blue and golden front panel and flowing turquoise cape with golden edging. An intricately detailed golden headdress with turquoise beading reflects that she is indeed Egyptian royalty.

Name: Medieval Lady Barbie Doll
Description: From The Great Eras® Collection, Barbie® doll captures the true essence of medieval times in this incredible costume. Her dark blue floor-length gown is accented by colorful detailing that lines her sleeves, a faux fur collar, and golden trim at the waist, neckline, and sleeves. Her braided hair is covered by a majestic golden hennin.

Name: Gibson Girl Barbie Doll
Description: The first doll in the Great Eras® collection reflecting different periods in history, Gibson Girl Barbie® doll represents the early 20th century. Wearing a long blue skirt, matching cape, white blouse, and cream-colored hat with ribbon accent, Barbie® exudes all the charm of the era she represents. Hair curled in ringlets, rooted eyelashes, and a lacy white parasol with pink and blue ribbon complete this nostalgic ensemble.

Name: 1920's Flapper Barbie Doll
Description: With all the style and sophistication reminiscent of the 1920s, Flapper® Barbie® doll from The Great Eras® Collection will surely "dance" her way into your heart!

Name: Southern Belle Barbie Doll
Description: From The Great Eras® Collection, Barbie® doll makes a lovely southern belle in this beautiful pink gown with turquoise-blue accents. Ruffled sleeves, full skirt adorned with rosettes and faux pearls, and a beautiful headband with turquoise and pink rosettes adorn this delicate costume. Dark hair and faux pearl choker create a dramatic contrast to the rest of Barbie® doll's costume.

Name: Barbie Doll as Eliza Doolittle from My Fair Lady in Her Closing Scene
Description: It's another authentic recreation from My Fair Lady™ as a very poised and proper Eliza Doolittle™ comes back to forgive the arrogant Henry Higgins™ in the film's final scene. By now Eliza has been transformed into a true lady, not just in clothes and diction, but in spirit as well. She's a picture of perfection in her sheer pink chiffon gown decorated with ruffles and a rosette. Her matching pink hat is also decorated with soft ruffles. From her graceful hat to her flowing pink boa, she'll make a lasting impression on anyone who sees her.

Name: Barbie Doll as Eliza Doolittle from My Fair Lady at the Embassy Ball
Description: Voices become hushed, and all eyes are upon her as Eliza Doolittle™ makes her debut at the Embassy Ball. Transformed into a perfect lady, she wins the admiration of everyone around her. She's utterly radiant in an ivory colored gown adorned with shimmering rhinestones and long beads. With her long white gloves, rhinestone necklace and rhinestone tiara crowning her beautiful brown hair, it's no wonder she's mistaken for royalty.

Name: Ken Doll as Professor Henry Higgins from My Fair Lady
Description: It's Ken® doll as a very distinguished Professor Henry Higgins™ in My Fair Lady™. You'll love him in his brown herringbone-like suit. His tailored trousers are cuffed at the bottom, and his two button jacket is worn over a very proper vest, white shirt and tie. Every detail is absolutely perfect, including the slight grey on the sides of his hair. He's the perfect accompaniment to Eliza in each of her ensembles, and his poseable body allows you to set scene after scene between the two of them.

Name: Barbie Doll as Eliza Doolittle from My Fair Lady as the Flower Girl
Description: Barbie® doll is the irrepressible Eliza Doolittle™ peddling violets at the Covent Garden Flower Market. It's the scene where, as a common girl hawking her flowers, she first meets Professor Henry Higgins™. Henry hears her atrocious English and bets he can turn her into a lady. It's no wonder she caught his attention. Even in her ragamuffin clothes, wearing a long skirt, floral apron, striped shirt, warm scarf and fitted jacket, she'll steal your heart.

Name: Barbie Doll as Eliza Doolittle from My Fair Lady at Ascot
Description: It's Barbie® doll as My Fair Lady™, wearing one of the most memorable costumes from the movie. Remember the moment? After months of coaching, Henry Higgins™ decides Eliza is ready to venture into "society" and takes her to the races at Ascot. Her diction is perfect, but her conversation still needs a little work as she shocks the ladies and gentlemen around her. Nevertheless, she couldn't "look" like more of a lady in her exquisite ensemble. She wears a slim, elegantly fitted white lace gown, dramatically trimmed with ruffles and ribbon. Her dainty parasol is the perfect accompaniment. And of course, her crowning glory is her tremendous hat. Trimmed with ribbons, flowers and marabou feathers, it makes an unforgettable statement.

Name: 2006 Holiday Barbie Doll by Bob Mackie
Description: This most beautiful season brings celebrations filled with the joy and love of family and friends. If you believe, the holidays deliver the gifts of harmony and hope, wrapped in magic and decorated with glamour! Bob Mackie again presents a beautiful gift for this special season. The 2006 Holiday™ Barbie® by Bob Mackie is wonderfully sophisticated in a black gown and white faux fur, embellished with festive multicolored stars. 2006 Holiday™ Barbie® marks Mr. Mackie's second Holiday™ Barbie® doll creation, sure to be treasured for years to come.

Name: 1994 Happy Holidays Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie® doll wears a glamorous, faux fur-trimmed golden dress with white and golden lace underskirt. Her fabulous ensemble is accented by holly and berries — it appears on her headband, earrings, and even accents her golden dress.

Name: Polly Pocket Stacie Doll
Description: Surprise!

Name: Bathtime Fun Shelly (blonde)
Description: Baby sister of Barbie! Squeeze ducky and bubbles!

Name: Kelly baby sister of Barbie! (Blonde)
Description: Kelly® is the little sister of Barbie®.

Name: Kelly baby sister of Barbie! (Blonde)
Description: Kelly® is the little sister of Barbie®.

Name: Little Debbie Barbie Doll Series II
Harley-Davidson Barbie Doll #1
Description: Barbie® doll and Harley-Davidson®. Who would have guessed they'd make a perfect match?Harley-Davidson Barbie® doll represents today's free-spirited woman. She's a vision in black faux leather, blonde hair and "silver" studs. Her jacket and backpack proudly display the Harley-Davidson logo. She also has "silver" hoop earrings, black boots, sunglasses and helmet. Harley-Davidson motorcycles are famous for style, performance, and their distinctive sound, which makes Harley-Davidson the ultimate riding experience. So, as Barbie® doll puts on her helmet and zips up her jacket, she's ready to ride on a motorcycle that can take her anywhere she wants to go!

Name: 35th Anniversary Barbie Doll (Blond)
Description: What a wonderful way to celebrate Barbie® doll's 35th anniversary! With this vintage reproduction of the original 1959 #1 Ponytail, 35th Anniversary Barbie® doll captures the nostalgic essence of those early Barbie® years. Wearing a reproduction of the original black and white stripe swimsuit, packaged with a reproduction of the original doll's box, and sporting that famous blond ponytail, Barbie® is sure to win a special place in collectors' hearts.

Name: Butterfly Prince Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie is ready to dance with Ken.

Name: Barbie Doll as Empress Sissy
Description: Get ready for a royal treat. It's a Limited Edition Barbie® doll, inspired by Empress Sissy of Austria's Habsburg-Lothringen Dynasty. Her costume was recreated from a 19th century painting and features a fitted satin bodice, decorated with sequins and beads and lavish golden braid. The back of her gown is hand sewn with tiny "faux pearl" buttons. From her lace trimmed pantaloons and shoes, to her delicate fan, to her dark braided hair accented with rhinestones, she's every bit an Empress.

Name: Gibson Girl Barbie Doll
Description: The first doll in the Great Eras® collection reflecting different periods in history, Gibson Girl Barbie® doll represents the early 20th century. Wearing a long blue skirt, matching cape, white blouse, and cream-colored hat with ribbon accent, Barbie® exudes all the charm of the era she represents. Hair curled in ringlets, rooted eyelashes, and a lacy white parasol with pink and blue ribbon complete this nostalgic ensemble.

Name: Sweet Magnolia Barbie Doll (hispanic)
Description: WAL MART

Name: Sweet Magnolia Barbie Doll (blonde)
Description: WAL MART

Name: Sweet Magnolia Barbie Doll (blonde)
Description: WAL MART

Name: Andalucia Barbie Doll
Description: Say “olé“ for the fabulous and flamboyant flamenco dancer Barbie® doll. Her traditional dance costume includes a long-line form-fitting bodice in bright red with white polka dots. Her lavish skirt is made of six tiers of ruffles. White eyelet lace alternates with the polka dot print and green trim for a dazzling effect. From her smiling face to her long dark hair adorned with two bright flowers, this captivating Limited Edition doll is sure to dance her way into your heart.

Name: Andalucia Barbie Doll
Description: Say “olé“ for the fabulous and flamboyant flamenco dancer Barbie® doll. Her traditional dance costume includes a long-line form-fitting bodice in bright red with white polka dots. Her lavish skirt is made of six tiers of ruffles. White eyelet lace alternates with the polka dot print and green trim for a dazzling effect. From her smiling face to her long dark hair adorned with two bright flowers, this captivating Limited Edition doll is sure to dance her way into your heart.

Name: Sea Pearl Mermaid Barbie Doll
Description: Imagine a fantasy world filled with mermaid and "pearls"! Where you could be one of those mermaid girls! From the tip of your head to the end of your fin, Be a mermaid with Barbie again and again!

Name: Polly Pocket Barbie Doll
Description: Hills Special Edition

Name: Evening Flame Barbie Doll (Brunette)
Description: Barbie sets the evening on fire in her beautiful gown flocked with crimson flowers!

Name: Evening Flame Barbie Doll (Brunette)
Description: Barbie sets the evening on fire in her beautiful gown flocked with crimson flowers!

Name: Flower Fun Barbie Doll
Description: Spring has sprung and Barbie is ready. She wears a floral patterned dress with mesh sleeves.

Name: Polly Pocket Barbie Doll
Description: Hills Special Edition

Name: Baywatch Barbie Doll
Description: Teresa is ready to rescue people in danger at sea.

Name: Baywatch Ken Doll
Description: Ken is ready to rescue people in danger at sea.

Name: Barbie Graphic Clear Crossbody Bag
Description: In collaboration with Barbie™, this transparent vinyl crossbody bag features a flap top with "Barbie" text graphic, push-lock closure, small structured body, high-polish hardware, dangling Barbie™ logo graphic and "Barbie F21" beaded charms with floral accents, and an adjustable faux leather shoulder strap.

Name: Barbie Roller Skate Figural Wireless Earbud Case Cover
Description: Barbie Roller Skate Figural Wireless Earbud Case Cover

Name: We Did It Barbies T-shirt Barbie The Movie
Description: President Barbie shares the good news on our soft and light T-shirt. (What’s the scoop? You’ll have to see Barbie The Movie to find out.) With just the right amount of stretch, this T-shirt is comfortable and flattering for all. Get this shirt for yourself or your favorite Barbie fan and celebrate the release of the feature film.

Name: Barbie I Can Be Computer Engineer Doll (AA)
Description: Barbie® I Can Be…™ Computer Engineer: Girls can play out the role of computer engineer plus have access to additional online content that allows girls to further “try on” the roles! Code inside each package unlocks career-themed content online. Includes doll, laptop computer and cell phone. Doll cannot stand alone. For ages 3 and over.

Name: Night Dazzle Barbie Doll (blonde)
Description: The Evening Elegance Series

Name: Spring Blossom Barbie Doll (Avon Exclusive)
Description: Barbie is ready for spring and is wearing a bright pink and purple dress with a big yellow bow to match her hat.

Name: Spring Petals Barbie Doll (hispanic)
Description: Barbie is ready for spring in her flower pink, yellow, and purple petal designed dress and flower bouquet!

Name: Avon Winter Velvet Barbie Doll
Description: Barbies gown is an elegant combination of white, silver and a velvety navy blue. The look is rounded out with silver earrings, and a blue hair ribbon.

Name: Yuletide Romance Barbie Doll
Description: A nostalgic Hallmark greeting card comes to life with this charming and demure holiday Barbie® doll. Her dark green velvety jacket is accented with opulent golden trim. An emerald green satin skirt billows out beneath the jacket while a golden bow and shimmering "brooch" add a festive holiday accent. From her strawberry blonde hair, piled elegantly atop her head, to her velvety handbag and matching green pumps, Yuletide Romance™ Barbie® doll brings you the warmth and nostalgia of the holiday season.

Name: Avon Winter Rhapsody Barbie Doll (brunette)
Description: Avon and Barbie are back with another collaboration. This stunning look that Barbie is wearing consists of a pink gingham skirt and a bright pink velvet jacket. The jacket is lined with faux fur and accented with a gold bow.

Name: Radiant Rose Barbie Doll
Description: She's as elegant and romantic as a flawless red rose in this stunning ball gown. Her floor length, velvety red gown is draped with a glittering satiny overskirt. A cascade of delicate roses falls from her shoulder to her tiny waist and accenting her long beautiful hair is one dramatic red rose. Sophisticated and glamorous, this Toys 'R Us Limited Edition doll is the second in the Society Style™ collection. She is available in both a white and ethnic version, both with beautiful red hair.

Name: 1993 Happy Holidays Barbie Doll
Description: Wearing a red tulle gown with golden bodice, Barbie® doll is ready to celebrate the season! Her golden bodice is accented by several red sequined and bead poinsettias. There's even a lovely poinsettia in her long flowing hair. What a beautiful vision of holiday cheer!

Name: 1997 Happy Holidays Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie® doll is a true image of royal splendor in holiday red, snowy white and glittering gold with a golden tiara adorned with six ruby-colored gemstones. Festive accents include a jeweled choker and earrings.

Name: Statue of Liberty Barbie Doll
Description: She's a symbol of liberty and a beacon of beauty. Meet Statue of Liberty Barbie®, the very first doll in the FAO Schwarz American Beauties Collection. She was designed as a tribute to the 110th anniversary of the Statue of Liberty, given to the United States by France to commemorate our centennial. Created by talented Mattel designer Heather Dutton, this exceptional Limited Edition doll captures the grace and beauty of the original Lady Liberty. From her gleaming torch to her majestic crown and shimmering red, white and blue gown she captures the spirit of America. Statue of Liberty Barbie® doll. Regal, majestic, beautiful. Let the fireworks begin!

Name: Barbie Doll as Rapunzel
Description: It's a fairytale come true as Barbie® portrays Rapunzel, the lovely maiden with her long, beautiful hair. It's a story every little girl loves, and Barbie® doll plays the part perfectly in an enchanting turquoise and lavender gown dusted with glitter. From her metallic bodice to her sparkling skirt and golden cap adorned with glittering streamers, this Collector Edition doll is the ultimate fairytale princess. And true to the tale, her braided hair reaches all the way to the floor to let her handsome prince climb up to her tower. It's no wonder she was a 1995 Doll Reader "Dolls of the Year" nominee.

Name: Jewel Hair Mermaid Teresa Doll
Description: The longest hair ever!

Name: Jewel Hair Mermaid Barbie Doll
Description: The longest hair ever!

Name: Barbie Pink Y2K Phone Charm
Description: Barbie Pink Y2K Phone Charm

Name: Police Officer Barbie
Description: Toys R Us Police Officer Barbie

Name: J. C. Penney ExclusiveSilver 'n Satin Set #921-1552
Description: This beautiful giftset featured a talking Barbie® doll with her exclusive J. C. Penney outfit. The ensemble featured a mini dress with a sleeveless top and silver and pink zigzag design lamé skirt and pink satin waistband. A pink satin coat with nylon lining and wide metallic silvertone belt at the empire waist completed the look. Accessories included a pink lacy half-slip with silver bow accent, sheer hot pink hose, silver purse, and hot pink closed-toe shoes. A hot pink two-piece Talking Barbie® doll swimsuit was also included.

Name: Barbie Doll 2000
Description: Barbie® doll celebrates the year 2000 in grand style, wearing a spectacular ensemble worthy of a momentous occasion. Sparkling straps accent her sophisticated, silhouette-style halter gown, which is embellished with rhinestones and ends in a slightly flared hem. Silvery glitter starbursts and the year "2000" add pretty touches and serve as festive reminders of the new millennium. A floor-length red satin stole, turned back to reveal its silvery lining, drapes gracefully around Barbie® doll's shoulders. Red and silver ornaments decorate her hairdo and drop earrings add the final glamorous touch.

Name: Evening Extravaganza Barbie Doll
Description: In a sleek strapless pink sheath gown and swirling pink iridescent wrap, Barbie® doll makes her entrance. What a stunning vision of sophisticated elegance! Her dress features silvery dots, and accessories include pink opera-length gloves, dangling pink and clear crystal beaded earrings, and a beaded choker. Her blond hair is upswept into an alluring wave of golden locks.

Name: Celebration Barbie Doll
Description: She's a lovely holiday dream come true — the absolutely breathtaking Celebration Barbie® doll. Sure to make the first holiday of the new Millennium something special to remember, she wears a lavish, glittering golden gown with a full taffeta underskirt. Her golden, shimmering bodice and luxuriously soft, faux fur collar add an extraordinary princess-like aura to her beauty. Holding a dazzling ornament, which pays tribute to the year 2000, she is a wonderful way to commemorate this momentous year. Celebration Barbie® Doll. The perfect holiday gift for some lucky little girl, or a dear friend who's young at heart.

Name: 2005 Holiday Barbie doll by Bob Mackie
Description: The 2005 holiday season brings a breathtaking addition to the Holiday™ Barbie® doll tradition! Created by renowned designer Bob Mackie, the gown is beautifully crafted of glitter printed jacquard, mushroom pleated tulle, fuchsia sparkle organza, and pink satin. The burgundy flock sash features a silvery edge. A glitter printed starburst design embellishes the shoulder. Brooch, necklace, earrings, and crown are the lovely accessories.

Name: Barbie Doll & Champion Horse
Description: Barbie can bend and move!

Name: Snow Princess Barbie Doll (blonde)
Description: Barbie® doll welcomes you to her winter wonderland! Fitted in an elegant white sequined gown with marabou feathers, she exudes the true beauty of a snow-filled day. She's sure to melt your heart!

Name: Disney Weekend Barbie Doll
Description: Have a magical Disney day with Barbie!

Description: Barbie tooth fairy doll

Name: Tooth Fairy Barbie Doll (Wal Mart)
Description: Barbie tooth fairy doll

Emerald Elegance Barbie Doll
Description: Special Edition.

Name: Barbie Makeup Sponge Set of 2
Description: Set of 2 makeup sponges for applying and blending liquid and paste foundation.

Name: Enchanted Evening Barbie Doll (Brunette)
Description: It's a night to remember, as this Collector Edition Barbie® doll wears a reproduction of one of her most popular vintage fashions from 1961. A white, faux fur stole wraps around an icy pink satin strapless gown while a delicate rose accents her tiny waist. A slim skirt with long, draping train adds an extra measure of glamour. She wears opera length gloves, a demure faux pearl choker with matching earrings, and glittery open-toe transparent pumps. With her luminous blonde hair and nostalgic face she'll take you to a place and time that's sure to capture your heart.

A lovely tiara, sparkling necklace, and a "crystal" ball keepsake ornament make her a beautiful way to welcome the year 2000!

Description: In a fitted black shimmering sheath gown that flairs at the hem, Barbie® doll re-creates the popular 1960 Solo in the Spotlight® fashion. Simple yet elegant, this wonderful reproduction features Barbie® with a blond ponytail and vintage face paint. Additional details include black pumps, long black gloves, a pink scarf, and a four strand faux pearl necklace. What a stunning reproduction!

Description: Barbie® doll is a true image of royal splendor in holiday red, snowy white and glittering gold with a golden tiara adorned with six ruby-colored gemstones. Festive accents include a jeweled choker and earrings.

Her ensemble is accented by red rhinestone berries, a poinsettia sash, jeweled choker and a red poinsettia in her hair.

Name: Romantic Ruffles #1871
Description: Barbie® doll looked her radiant best in this pink and silver evening dress. The silvery lamé over the pink, sleeveless bodice met a five tiered pink net skirt sparkled with silver dots. The ruffles had a sheer lining and a hot pink taffeta underskirt. A pink satin ribbon and a net and taffeta flower accented the empire waist. Mod rosette earrings of sheer pink fabric and a silvertone bead on chains hung to Barbie® doll's shoulders. A clutch bag was fashioned of the silvery lamé and was lined in the pink taffeta. It closed with a silvertone bead button. Pink soft bow or pilgrim shoes completed the ensemble.

Name: Rally Gear #1429
Description: The mod leather jacket look was accomplished in Ken® doll's vinyl, double-breasted waist-length style. A long sleeved striped shirt and tan zippered slacks were completed with a pair of brown vinyl cowboy boots.

Name: Rally Gear #1429
Description: The mod leather jacket look was accomplished in Ken® doll's vinyl, double-breasted waist-length style. A long sleeved striped shirt and tan zippered slacks were completed with a pair of brown vinyl cowboy boots.

Name: Ken A Go Go #1423
Description: Ken® doll went mod with his first gig at the local nightspot. He sang and played his guitar (the orange ukulele seen in Ken® In Hawaii #1404 with a black cord neck strap added). His adjustable gray metal and plastic microphone was like the one found in Solo In The Spotlight #982. His wild shirt was a striped fabric in blue, yellow and red with red collar and sleeves. It topped gold twill zippered slacks. He wore red knit socks with his bouncy white tennis shoes. Ken® doll's crew cut had not grown out yet, so he donned a fun faux fur black wig and made a hit at the club!

Name: 1990 Happy Holidays Barbie Doll
Description: Dressed in pink, Barbie® doll's layered fuchsia gown glitters with sparkling silvery accents. Poufed sleeves and accompanying star ornament add special touches to this lovely vision of holiday bliss.

Name: 1989 Happy Holidays Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie® is a vision in white in this fabulous tulle gown with a faux fur-trimmed overskirt and stole. Her long blonde hair is curled in ringlets, and accented by a snowflake-decorated hair band that matches the accompanying snowflake ornament.

Name: Byron Lars In the Limelight Barbie Doll
Description: The first doll in Byron Lars' magnificent Runway Collection, In the Limelight™ Barbie® celebrates fresh, contemporary fashion. Barbie® is powerful, feminine, dynamic and glamorous. Her velvety gown of rich chocolate brown is boldly accented with a metallic cape lined in luscious lime. Strappy shoes and a dash of faux fur complete her dramatic look. Dynamic. Sophisticated. Completely unique.

Name: Benefit Ball Barbie Doll
Description: The premier doll in the elegant and popular Classique® Collection. With titian hair, a stunning metallic blue and golden-colored gown, and fabulous accessories, Benefit Ball™ Barbie® doll is a true vision of style and sophistication. Dressed for a grand charity ball, Barbie® is draped in billows of metallic blue and golden fabric. Rooted eyelashes, golden earrings, and golden opera gloves complete this lavish look.

Name: Starlight Dance Barbie Doll
Description: Starlight Dance™ Barbie® doll wears an off-white silky crepe gown with glittering chiffon panels and ruffles highlighting the side of the dress. Sparkling crystal rhinestones accent the sheer fitted bodice and emphasize the beauty of the sweeping design. Her sparkling accessories include bracelets, earrings and an imaginative headband, while her stunning hair is swept into a dramatic up-do.

Name: Starlight Dance Barbie Doll
Description: Starlight Dance™ Barbie® doll wears an off-white silky crepe gown with glittering chiffon panels and ruffles highlighting the side of the dress. Sparkling crystal rhinestones accent the sheer fitted bodice and emphasize the beauty of the sweeping design. Her sparkling accessories include bracelets, earrings and an imaginative headband, while her stunning hair is swept into a dramatic up-do.

Name: Romantic Interlude Barbie Doll
Description: A portrait in elegance, this 1997 Classique Collection Barbie® doll features a striking combination of black and white in a timeless silhouette. Created by designer Ann Driskill, Romantic Interlude™ Barbie® makes a strong statement in a long, black velvety coat that opens to reveal an off-white satin underskirt. Rhinestone buttons highlight the bodice and hat with a simple spray of black and white feathers completing one of the most elegant Barbie® ensembles ever. Underneath her skirt, she wears black boots to complete the outfit. Her brown hair is flatteringly bobbed at her chin and she has rooted eyelashes.

Name: Midnight Gala Barbie Doll
Description: The clock strikes twelve and Barbie® doll makes a grand entrance. Wearing an elegant black velvet gown with gold glitter and rhinestones accenting the bodice, she's certain to turn heads. Her dramatic cape with ornate detailing tops off this truly stunning design. This ultra glamorous Classique® Collection doll was created by veteran Mattel designer Abbe Littleton. From her long golden earrings and jeweled headpiece, to her rooted eyelashes and perfectly placed beauty mark, Barbie® makes this one gala you'll never forget.

Name: Uptown Chic Barbie Doll
Description: In a fabulous mix of faux leather and lace, Barbie® doll achieves a very chic look. Her stylish ensemble includes white faux leather top, short pants, and trapeze coat. Matching hat and pumps accompany this fun outfit.

Name: Opening Night Barbie Doll
Description: Opening Night™ Barbie® doll is a stunning vision of pink splendor. Wearing a fitted silvery and pink jacket with sequins and beads, a flowing fuchsia skirt with silvery trim, and a matching hat with silvery trim, Barbie® is ready to attend a major opening night event. Her black hair and rooted eyelashes create a dramatic contrast to the fuchsia and silver colors of her ensemble.

Name: City Style Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie® doll is ready for a fun day of city shopping in this stylish white and golden suit. Her lined white dress with golden top, white jacket trimmed in golden braid, and stylish short blond hair make Barbie® quite the trendsetter. Stylish accessories include a white hat with golden trim, white purse with golden shoulder strap, and a matching white shopping bag with a golden Barbie® "B".

Name: Benefit Ball Barbie Doll
Description: The premier doll in the elegant and popular Classique® Collection. With titian hair, a stunning metallic blue and golden-colored gown, and fabulous accessories, Benefit Ball™ Barbie® doll is a true vision of style and sophistication. Dressed for a grand charity ball, Barbie® is draped in billows of metallic blue and golden fabric. Rooted eyelashes, golden earrings, and golden opera gloves complete this lavish look.

Name: Sapphire Dream Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie® doll will surely take your breath away in this fabulous blue ensemble! Wearing a simple yet elegant sapphire-blue gown and matching blue wrap with golden accents, this limited edition doll captures the essence of her namesake. Her long blond hair cascades around her shoulders, and is accented by an adorable blue hair ribbon with golden trim. Golden drop earrings and rooted eyelashes complete Barbie® doll's stunning look.

Name: Emerald Enchantment Barbie Doll
Description: A stunning vision in green, Emerald Enchantment™ Barbie® doll is surrounded by a swirling gown sparkling with golden highlights. The third and final doll in the Society Style Collection® available exclusively at Toys R Us, Barbie® wears an emerald green dress with a taffeta bodice and velvety skirt. She has an emerald green shawl edged in golden thread. Accessories include a headband, earrings, and a golden hand ring. She is a true beauty for all to behold and treasure always.

Name: Jewel Princess Barbie Doll
Description: Celebrate the holidays in royal fashion. This elegant, Limited Edition doll from the Winter Princess Collection wears a short, red velvety coat trimmed in soft, white cozy "fur. " The peplum styling accents Barbie® doll's tiny waist while her jaunty red hat complements her long, blonde hair. From her snowy muff to her classic, plaid skirt, she's the perfect doll to warm your holiday season.

Name: Men's Ken Box Costume
Description: Having a great smile filled with pearly whites is nice. Fixing your hair into a stylish do is cool... Wearing fashionable clothing is fine and all. However, what's the point of all of that if you're just walking around in the world completely unprotected?

Name: Evergreen Princess Barbie Doll (blonde)
Description: Barbie® doll is dressed in a stunning evergreen gown accented by golden ribbons of fabric. Her long wavy hair is pulled away from her delicately featured face by a golden headband, showing off the lovely golden earrings that dangle from her dainty ears. A matching golden choker hangs around her neck.

Name: Peppermint Princess Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie® doll makes a delightful princess in this candy cane-inspired ensemble. She's dressed in a sleeveless red fitted bodice with white faux fur-trimmed collar and cap, long white fingerless gloves, and a red and white striped full skirt. Golden floral accents at her waist and in her hair complement this candy-inspired costume.

Name: Peppermint Princess Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie® doll makes a delightful princess in this candy cane-inspired ensemble. She's dressed in a sleeveless red fitted bodice with white faux fur-trimmed collar and cap, long white fingerless gloves, and a red and white striped full skirt. Golden floral accents at her waist and in her hair complement this candy-inspired costume.
